blocks.text: Tidenes skrell: Bodø/Glimt dump Inter Milan out of the Champions League

Norwegian football rewrote history: Glimt's 2-1 win at San Siro — 'noe av det mest absurde' per NRK — sends the Arctic club into the CL round of 16. Sørloth's hat-trick for Atlético made it a night of Norwegian brilliance.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) in action: 100 Thieves vs MANA, DraculaN Season 5
